{{Relic Infobox|Tea of Discourtesy|2}}
{{R|Tea of Discourtesy||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Tea Master|2}} event. After pickup, it will shuffle 2 {{C|Dazed||2}} into your Draw Pile at the start of the next combat.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Tea Master|2}} event by selecting the {{Frame|Tea of Discourtesy}} option.
